summary: Completed TASK-149: Designed workflow card/list views (thumbnails, metadata, actions). Created 4 design artifacts: component spec (docs/design/component-specs/workflow-card-list.md), design tokens JSON (src/design/tokens/workflow-card-list.json), CSS custom properties (src/design/css/workflow-card-list-variables.css), and Tailwind theme extensions (src/design/tailwind/workflow-card-list-theme.ts). Covers grid card anatomy, miniature canvas thumbnail rendering, agent avatar stacks, status badges with animated dots, actions menu, quick action overlays, list table view with sortable headers, row checkboxes, bulk actions bar, responsive breakpoints, and accessibility requirements.
